PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Grego appeared by telephone for Lucy Itazu.

The Court stated that the Probate Examiner's notes have not been responded to and that proper notice hasn't been given for this petition. Mr. Grego stated that they sent a notice of proposed action. The Court informed Mr. Grego that there was a notice of the supplement, although it was filed prior to the supplement having been filed, that there was no notice for the original petition and that neither notice contains the required language. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to February 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper notice.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Continued To Jan-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Continued To Dec-19-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Grego appeared by telephone for Lucy Itazu.

The Court stated that it still does not have a proposed order. Mr. Grego stated that he submitted a proposed order electronically and that he will arrange to have one physically dropped off today. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to December 19, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Grego appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Mr. Grego stated that the Estate of Katy Yamamoto has closed and he received distribution, and that he is now prepared to close this estate. Mr. Grego also stated that he did not see the Probate Examiner's notes that were sent on September 22, 2017. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to November 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a response to the Examiner's notes.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-05-2017 Continued To Sep-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Continued To Aug-09-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Grego appeared by telephone for Lucy Itazu.

Mr. Grego stated that he provided a letter to the Probate Examiner on Monday, that all of the tax returns have been filed, that litigation settled and that he filed a notice of proposed action with all of the beneficiaries consenting to the settlement agreement. Mr. Grego also stated that the Estate can't close, and informed the Court that there is a companion case (Estate of Kay Yamamoto Leghorn PES-14-297451) and that this estate is to receive a portion of the Leghorn Estate. The Court Examiner informed Counsel that he needs to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to August 9, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
